modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Cannot print from personal laptop on wireless network.

full_description_text: No puedo imprimir con mi laptop personal. Estoy en una red inalámbrica y no funciona. Intenté varias veces, pero no hay impresión.
short_description: Cannot print from personal laptop on wireless network.
description: No puedo imprimir con mi laptop personal. Estoy en una red inalámbrica y no funciona. Intenté varias veces, pero no hay impresión.
